result: If I could change the world in one way, I would make sure that the basic needs of every person—food, clean water, shelter, health care, and education—were guaranteed, regardless of where they happen to be born. In a world where no one had to struggle for these essentials, people would have the freedom and the safety net to pursue their passions, contribute to their communities, and care for the planet. It’s the foundation on which everything else—fairness, creativity, peace, and environmental stewardship—can truly flourish.

It’s the foundation on which everything else—fairness, creativity, peace, and environmental stewardship—can truly flourish.
